Off Calendar Oct-05-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge James Robertson, Clerk Karissa Shaw, Not Reported. (502)

APPEARANCES:
Randall Scarlett of the Scarlett Law Group representing the plaintiff.
Colin Jewell of Cholakian & Associates representing the defendant.

This matter comes on calendar for a conference call between court and counsel regarding the plaintiff's request to release sworn juror contact information. After hearing argument, the court GRANTS the plaintiff's request. The court will issue an official order and the clerk will e-mail the juror list to Mr. Scarlett.

Matter adjourned.
